stemHtml: In an electrical circuit, you have a supply of 240 V and a load of 50 Ohms. The load is suddenly malfunctioning, providing a lower resistance than rated. What can you expect?

options.a: The resistance will increase which will lead to an increased heat output.
options.b: The ampere will increase which will lead to an increased heat output.
options.c: The ampere will decrease which will lead to an increased heat output.
options.d: The supply will increase which will lead to an increased heat output.
